name: PoC Scope and Pricing

content.title: PoC Scope, Timeline, and Pricing
content.description: Detailed PoC engagement model with timeline and investment
content.markdown:
# PoC Scope, Timeline, and Pricing

## Engagement Model

| Selection | Use Cases | Investment |
|-----------|-----------|------------|
| **Single Use Case** | Document Processing OR Excel Submission | **100,000 USD** |
| **Recommended Package** | Document Processing + Excel Submission | **150,000 USD** |
| **Extended Package** | Add UW Renewal Automation | **+50,000 USD** |

## What is Included

### Use Case 1: Document Processing (100k)
- Document classification prototype
- Field extraction from sample documents
- Partner assignment (AI-driven routing)
- Search interface (natural language prototype)
- Email triage (optional)
- Data model with annotations
- Accuracy benchmarks

### Use Case 2: Excel Submission Ingestion (+50k)
- Format detection for 2-3 Excel templates
- Schema inference mapping to target model
- Data extraction (limits, exposures, loss history)
- Validation and anomaly flagging
- Submission data model
- Accuracy benchmarks

## What is NOT Included

- Production deployment
- Enterprise integrations (beyond API-level)
- Full security hardening
- Production documentation
- Live mailbox integration
- PowerBI integration

## Timeline: 4-6 Week PoC Execution

| Week | Key Milestones |
|------|----------------|
| **Week 1** | Kickoff complete, data access established, scope finalized |
| **Week 2** | Data model drafted, first document processing results |
| **Week 3** | Agents configured, extraction pipeline operational |
| **Week 4** | Search interface functional, email triage prototype |
| **Week 5** | Refinement based on testing, accuracy metrics established |
| **Week 6** | Documentation complete, final demo delivered |

## Success Criteria Philosophy

Success criteria are **learning indicators**, not contractual thresholds:

| Target Metric | How We Use It |
|---------------|---------------|
| Search < 60 seconds | Baseline for architecture tuning |
| Extraction >= 80% | Starting point for refinement |
| Partner assignment >= 90% | Measure improvement over PoC |
| Classification >= 90% | Identify document types needing attention |
